rationale: Shared instr* blocks tightened with full sections (Step 0/Reports/Bead-override/Review-gate/Constraints), per-variant prose collapsed to bullets. FEAT-022 guardrail comment block added; selector at executeBeadInstructionsText preserved (agent/fiz/embedded→Agent, default→Claude). Comprehensive guardrail/selector/invariant/governing/size-floor tests cover AC2-AC6 and AC10.

findings.summary: AC2 size-floor test hard-codes baselines (1048/968) from parent commit 63bb619; commit reports 597/582 — comfortably under the 0.70 floor.

AC4 'no git add -A' invariant is enforced indirectly: the required-substring list includes 'git add -A' which only appears as part of the prohibition phrase 'never `git add -A`' in the constants. Acceptable but a stricter check (e.g. forbid bare 'git add -A' not preceded by 'never') would be more robust.
